course.title: How to Get Started With Your Vacation Rental Business
course.keywords: Learn how to make the most out of your vacation rental with our free short-term rental course.

seo-v_introduction_to_seo.title: Get started with the Lodgify Academy
seo-v_introduction_to_seo.description: Introduction to the course & The Lodgify Academy: overview video of the content, structure and features of the course.

seo-v_making_the_decision.title: All you need to know before buying your property
seo-v_making_the_decision.description: Places to invest, types of properties, seasonality, there's a lot you need to know to get started! So in this first chapter you'll learn all you need to consider before you invest in your vacation rental property.

seo-v_getting_started.title: How to create the perfect Vacation Rental Business Plan
seo-v_getting_started.description: Now, how to actually get started? With the business plan of course! Define your goals, analyze the industry and competitors, create your marketing, financial and revenue management plans and attract investors with a great executive summary!

howto_tech__hosting_with_enso_connect.title: Tech & Hosting with Enso Connect
howto_tech__hosting_with_enso_connect.description: All about how new technologies are changing the hosting and vacation rental industries and learn how to use them to boost your business.

learningPath.subtitle: François from Enso Connect talks about the role of new technologies in the vacation rental industry

seo-v_getting_your_property_ready_.title: Getting Your Property Ready
seo-v_getting_your_property_ready_.description: Learn how to get your property ready for your guests! Cleaning best practices, decoration, furnishing and optimize your checki-in and check-out experience to make it easier for your guests!

howto_optimize_your_rental_interview_wit.title: Optimize Your Rental: Interview with Daniel Rusteen
howto_optimize_your_rental_interview_wit.description:
Daniel Rusteen has been in the Vacation Rental business for more than 10 years, successfully managing various rentals. 

He's also the creator of the YouTube channel: Optimize My Airbnb. In this interview you'll get some great insight on how to optimize your vacation rental business. We'll also cover some topics of Daniel's second book.

seo-v_licensing.title: All About Licensing
seo-v_licensing.description: Do I need a license!? What type? How to get them? Here we'll cover the options you have so that you can open you vacation rental to business as soon as possible!

learningPath.subtitle: ebook
learningPath.courseTitle: How to Get Started With Your Vacation Rental Business

seo-v_pricing.title: Getting your pricing and rates right
seo-v_pricing.description:
Make the most out of your rates! 

In this section you'll learn all about pricing best practices: how to define the best rates for your business, how to use dynamic pricing, and how to present your rates.

seo-v_tips.title: Extra tips before welcoming your guests
seo-v_tips.description:
Almost done! 

In this last chapter we'll cover the last, but not least, steps before you welcome your first guests: write killer descriptions, learn how to manage your reviews, choose the best name for your business and learn how to get the best pics for your vacation rental listings!
